channel.title: GeoPulse. Geopolitics in brief
channel.description: Signal-first briefings on geopolitics, edited by Lavkesh Dwivedi.

item.title: Iranian gunboat targets container ship off Oman coast: Maritime agency
item.description: An Iranian gunboat targeted a container ship off the Oman coast, according to a maritime agency. The incident occurred without immediate explanation or consequences. Iranian gunboat targets container ship off Oman coast: Maritime agency.

item.title: Iranian gunboat opens fire on ship after Trump extends ceasefire
item.description: An Iranian gunboat opened fire on a ship after US President Trump extended a ceasefire. The attack occurred in the Strait of Hormuz, with no reported casualties or environmental impact.

item.title: Iran fires on container ship in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Iran fired on a container ship in the Strait of Hormuz, according to the UK's Maritime Trade Operations centre. The attack caused no injuries or environmental damage. The British military’s United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations centre said no one was hurt and there was no environmental impact from the attack.

item.title: Record number of immigrants reside in EU in 2025
item.description: The foreign-born population in the EU reached a record 64 million in 2025. Germany remains the largest host of immigrants, but smaller nations have a higher percentage of foreign-born residents.

item.title: US halts shipment of Iraq’s oil dollars in bid to curb Iran-linked groups
item.description: The US blocked a plane carrying nearly $500 million in US banknotes bound for Iraq, citing efforts to curb Iran-linked groups. A plane carrying nearly $500m in US banknotes was blocked by the US Treasury, according to The Wall Street Journal.

item.title: Iran says U.S. naval blockade has little impact on food supply
item.description: Iran's Agriculture Minister Gholamreza Nouri said the US naval blockade has little impact on food supply, claiming Iran has no problem supplying basic goods and food. The statement comes as tensions between the two countries remain high.

item.title: Chinese navy passes by Japanese islands again after Pacific training
item.description: China's navy passed by Japanese islands during a Pacific training exercise. The move is the latest in a series of naval operations near Japanese territory, sparking concerns about regional security.

item.title: Iran Found Its 'Nuclear Weapon'. Now The US Has To Adapt
item.description: Iran's ability to disrupt tanker traffic through the Hormuz has become a strategic challenge for the US. The country's actions have effectively created a nuclear-like weapon without physical destruction, forcing the US to find a way around this challenge.

item.title: Trump extends ceasefire but blockade continues; Iran attacks container ship off Oman
item.description: Trump extended the ceasefire with Iran. Iran attacked a container ship off Oman. Middle East crisis live: Trump extends ceasefire but blockade continues; Iran attacks container ship off Oman The Guardian.

item.title: Trump says Iran ‘collapsing financially’ over Hormuz closure
item.description: Trump extended the Iran ceasefire while maintaining a blockade. Israel and Hezbollah trade fire with talks expected this week, even as more talks are expected in Washington this week after a 10-day ceasefire went into effect last Friday.

item.title: Netherlands intelligence agency sees risk of future Russia–NATO clash
item.description: The Netherlands intelligence agency warns of a risk of future Russia-NATO clashes. The agency's assessment highlights ongoing tensions between the two sides, which have been escalating in recent years. Netherlands intelligence agency sees risk of future Russia–NATO clash Caliber. Az.

item.title: Priceless 2,500-year-old golden helmet returned to Romania after Dutch museum raid
item.description: A 2,500-year-old golden helmet stolen from a Dutch museum in 2025 has been recovered and returned to Romania. The ornate Cotofenesti helmet was recovered last month, ending a year-long search for the priceless artifact.

item.title: Mexico to beef up security at tourist sites after shooting at pyramids
item.description: Mexico's government is boosting security at tourist sites ahead of the World Cup after a man opened fire at the Teotihuacan pyramids. The move aims to prevent similar incidents and ensure visitor safety.

item.title: Lufthansa Cuts 20,000 Flights As Fuel Prices Soar Amid Iran War
item.description: Lufthansa cut 20,000 flights due to soaring fuel prices amid the Iran war. The airline implemented the first 120 cancellations immediately. The first 120 cancellations were implemented today. Lufthansa Cuts 20,000 Flights As Fuel Prices Soar Amid Iran War.

item.title: Heatwaves, floods and wildfires pose rising threat to democracy, report finds
item.description: Climate-related disasters disrupted 23 elections in 18 countries in 2024, a report found. At least 94 elections across 52 countries were affected by extreme weather.

item.title: Iran denies Trump’s claim of women protesters facing execution
item.description: Iran denied Trump's claim that women protesters face execution. Iran denies Trump’s claim of women protesters facing execution.

item.title: The Russia-Ukraine War Reveals the Limits of “CNN Effect”
item.description: The Russia-Ukraine war has exposed the limitations of the "CNN Effect," according to the Australian Institute of International Affairs. The conflict has challenged the role of media in shaping public opinion.

item.title: Phone tracking shows how Colombian mercenaries backed Sudan's RSF - report
item.description: Colombian mercenaries backed Sudan's Rapid Support Forces (RSF), research by Conflict Insights Group (CIG) found. The study also revealed the extent of UAE involvement in the conflict. The Conflict Insights Group (CIG) says its research also shows the extent of UAE involvement.

item.title: Hezbollah says attacked north Israel in response to Israeli truce violations
item.description: Hezbollah attacked north Israel in response to alleged Israeli truce violations. It said the move came “in defence of Lebanon and its people and in response to the blatant” Israeli ceasefire violations, including “attacks on civilians and the destruction of their homes and villages”.

item.title: Trump says US is extending ceasefire while awaiting proposal from Iran
item.description: US President Trump said the US is extending a ceasefire with Iran while awaiting a proposal from Iran. The move comes amid heightened tensions in the region. Live updates: Trump says US is extending ceasefire while awaiting proposal from Iran AP News.
